description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs, codespell and compile. The codespell job runs in the default stage using the debian:stable image, runs before_script apt update and apt install -qy codespell, then executes codespell *. The compile job runs in the build stage using the golang image, runs before_script mkdir -p /go/src, ln -s /builds /go/src/gitlab.com, cd /go/src/gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_PATH, then runs the script commands: date, go get, date, make lint, date, make build, date, make tarball, date, date -Ins > build/timestamp.txt, git describe > build/git-describe.txt. It always stores the build/ directory as an artifact with no expiration.
